requirements.title: Identity API contract
requirements.statement:
The identity API exposes authentication and account-access endpoints.

#### Scenario: Contract is served

- GIVEN the published contract
- WHEN a client calls an endpoint
- THEN the service honours the contract

requirements.title: Login issues session token
requirements.statement:
Login issues a session token for valid credentials.

#### Scenario: Valid credentials

- GIVEN a registered user
- WHEN they submit correct credentials
- THEN they receive a session token

artifacts.proposal:
# Identity service
Implement the identity service against the merged contracts.
artifacts.tasks:
# Tasks
- [ ] TASK-001 Implement the identity API surface.
- [ ] TASK-002 Implement login session issuance.

specs.content:
## Identity service
Implements authentication and account access.
